summary: Two sovereign cells (one on F1, one on F2) run a peer_exchange without federation execution. Each emits a SovereignCellWitness; the witness pair is self-contained. The federations act only as notaries — neither's ledger applies the remote cell's effect.

must_not_pass_explanation._note: must_not_pass for this scenario lives in the SovereignCellWitness AIR teeth (AUDIT-sovereign-witness-teeth.md). When the AIR enforces sequence-monotonicity inside the proof rather than as an external check, the negative cases (skipped witness, equal sequence, cross-cell witness reuse, signed-under-old-key after rotation) will be enforceable from receipts alone. Today's scenario asserts the property at the orchestration level.

blocked_on: SovereignCellWitness AIR teeth — see AUDIT-sovereign-witness-teeth.md. Today the witness verifies Ed25519 + records a sequence, but the AIR does not enforce sequence-monotonicity inside the proof.
wire/src/hardening.rs: peer_exchange CapTP message variant — the scenario probes the HTTP /turns/peer-exchange route but does not exercise the full sovereign-to-sovereign wire flow.
documented_gaps: Both peer_exchange route probes use empty bodies and expect any non-404 response. A signed payload would exercise the full code path; that's the next milestone.

F1_ledger_unchanged_by_idle_observation is asserted between two /api/cells snapshots 2s apart. Solo-mode nodes can autonomously advance height (e.g. via gossip-driven cell creation); the scenario tolerates this as informational rather than a failure.

#88 strengthened (2026-05-25): sovereign_witness_self_verifies_without_committee replaced unconditional true with a Python Ed25519 sign+verify cycle (PyCA cryptography or nacl). Signs a canonical witness message (pyana-sovereign-witness-v1 || cell_id || prev_state || post_state || sequence), verifies it, then confirms a tampered message (wrong sequence byte) is rejected. Records false if neither crypto library is available. Remaining weaknesses: peer_exchange_id_derivation_deterministic and sovereign_witness_sequence_monotonic_strict are still synthetic (PREV=0/POST=1 hardcoded); F1_ledger_unchanged_by_idle_observation can race on solo-mode nodes.
improve_dont_degrade: When the sovereign-witness AIR teeth land, the must_not_pass list grows: sovereign_witness_skipped_for_sovereign_transition_accepts, sovereign_witness_with_sequence_regression_accepts, sovereign_witness_signing_message_tampered_accepts, sovereign_witness_cross_cell_reuse_accepts, sovereign_witness_signed_under_old_key_after_rotation_accepts, sovereign_witness_with_equal_sequence_accepts. Each is a receipts-alone negative test.
